# Snippets from history, be it events, places, persons

[](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

Welcome to History Under Your Feet by me, Ratnakar Sadasyula. I am Ratnakar, from Hyderabad, working as an IT professional. I post here mostly on Indian History, Temples, Hinduism, Indian Culture, Movies. Author of City of Victory, a book on the rise and fall of Vijayanagara Empire.

Sign up now so you don’t miss the first issue.

Subscribe
